summary: Accepted npm audit findings for development-only tooling in the extension workspace. These findings do not affect the production extension code or the release artifact shipped to users.

exceptions.reason: The advisory only affects esbuild's development server. This project uses esbuild for bundling during the build step and does not run the esbuild dev server in production.
The ReDoS issue is in ESLint config comment parsing. It only matters while linting untrusted source code and does not affect the shipped extension runtime.
This is the same underlying advisory as @eslint/plugin-kit. npm audit reports eslint because it depends on the vulnerable parser code used only during linting.
